title: microliabum humile
intro: Microliabum humile, also known as creeping Oregon grape, is a flowering plant native to the Pacific coast of North America. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Microliabum humile include its ability to support liver and kidney function, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of digestive issues and skin conditions. Microliabum humile is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in topical applications such as creams and ointments.
